title: Characters
description: Manage character definitions and configure ACL for users, groups, subtrees, and all authenticated users.
loginRequired: Please sign in before opening the character library.
dialogDescription: Name and personality prompt directly affect Cocoon conversations.
makePublic: Expose this character to authenticated users
aclDialogDescription: Configure access levels for users, groups, subtrees, and all authenticated users.
aclEmpty: There are no extra ACL rules yet.
effectiveDescription: Inspect the final permission sources resolved by the backend for a user or group.
effectiveEmpty: No effective access result loaded yet.
permissionReadDesc: Can view character details and prompt data.
permissionUseDesc: Can create cocoons from this character.
permissionManageDesc: Can edit, delete, and manage ACL for this character.
confirmDeleteDescription: Deletion is irreversible. The backend will reject it if a cocoon still uses this character.
